mapper.select: SELECT sa.action_id AS actionId, sa.screen_id AS screenId, s.screen_key AS screenKey, s.screen_name AS screenName, sa.action_key AS actionKey, sa.action_name AS actionName, sa.use_yn AS useYn FROM role_actions ra JOIN screen_actions sa ON sa.action_id = ra.action_id AND sa.use_yn = TRUE JOIN screens s ON s.screen_id = sa.screen_id AND s.use_yn = TRUE WHERE ra.role_key = #{roleKey}
SELECT screen_id AS screenId, screen_key AS screenKey, screen_name AS screenName, use_yn AS useYn FROM screens ORDER BY screen_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO screens (screen_key, screen_name, use_yn) VALUES (#{screenKey}, #{screenName}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE screens SET screen_name = #{screenName}, use_yn = #{useYn} WHERE screen_id = #{screenId}
mapper.select: SELECT sa.action_id AS actionId, sa.screen_id AS screenId, s.screen_key AS screenKey, s.screen_name AS screenName, sa.action_key AS actionKey, sa.action_name AS actionName, sa.use_yn AS useYn FROM screen_actions sa JOIN screens s ON s.screen_id = sa.screen_id WHERE sa.screen_id = #{screenId} ORDER BY sa.action_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO screen_actions (screen_id, action_key, action_name, use_yn) VALUES (#{screenId}, #{actionKey}, #{actionName}, #{useYn})
mapper.update: UPDATE screen_actions SET action_name = #{actionName}, use_yn = #{useYn} WHERE action_id = #{actionId}
mapper.select: SELECT role_key FROM role_actions WHERE action_id = #{actionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_actions (role_key, action_id) VALUES (#{roleKey}, #{actionId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM role_actions WHERE role_key = #{roleKey} AND action_id = #{actionId}
